name: Dilly Carrots
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the fresh dill sprigs into 1-inch lengths with stems.
2. Scrub the carrots and trim any dark ends.
3. In a large saucepan, heat water, vinegar, garlic, pepper flakes, dill seeds, and salt until boiling.
4. Add the carrots to the saucepan and bring to a simmer.
5. Reduce the heat and simmer covered for 10 minutes.
6. Using tongs, arrange the carrots in hot sterilized pint jars.
- To sterilize the jars, submerge them in water and gently boil for 10 minutes; keep in hot water until ready to use.
7. Pour the hot vinegar mixture into the jars, covering the carrots and distributing the spices evenly.
8. Tuck fresh dill between the carrots.
9. Cover the jars tightly with new lids.
10. Allow the jars to cool.
11. Store in the refrigerator for 2-3 days. The flavor improves with storage.
